title: dichocarpum dicarpon
intro: Dichocarpum dicarpon, also known as the two-fruit horned poppy or Chinese horned poppy, is a plant species native to China and Tibet, belonging to the genus Dichocarpum in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and analgesic effects, which can help relieve pain and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Dichocarpum dicarpon include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its use in treating fever and rheumatism. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
